name: Chickens Be Crazy
short_description: The greatest chicken-based, single-screen puzzle platformer of all time (according to me)! Use your skillz to collect produce, outwit crazy chickens, and jetpack through 100 levels of family-friendly fun. Smash bricks, unlock doors, and discover secrets that will keep you coming back for more!
detailed_description:
It is said that Chickens Be Crazy is the greatest single-screen, chicken-based, puzzle-solving platformer of all time. (Okay, I’m the one who says that - but you’ll see!)

Farmer Fred wakes up to his worst nightmare - his chickens have flown the coop and gone totally bonkers! Your mission? Help Farmer Fred collect the produce scattered across each level to unlock doors and find out what’s driving the chickens mad. Grab your boots and get ready to run, jump, climb, and outwit mischievous other cluckers in a world packed with chaotic fun, brain-bending puzzles, and the occasional “oops, I stepped in something” moment. 💩

Inspired by timeless classics like Donkey Kong, Lode Runner, and Chuckie Egg, Chickens Be Crazy blends retro charm with modern fun. Farmer Fred’s not just dealing with your average chickens here. We’re talking confronting ladder climbing, teleporting (probably), alien robot chickens (or are we? 🤔). You’ll need every ounce of your wits and skillz to survive this action-packed puzzle adventure - and maybe a few laughs along the way. Whether you’re here for the challenge, the charm, or just to test yourself against unusual poultry, one thing’s for sure: you’ll be back for “just one more level.”

Key Features:

🐔 100 levels of clucking madness: Collect all the produce to unlock doors, rescue the chickens, and solve the mystery of their wild behavior (plus a few secret levels, if you’re clever enough to find them).

🕹️ Controller and keyboard support: Game your way. Whether you’re a keyboard ninja or a controller connoisseur, we’ve got you covered. No excuses!

🎮 Jump into any level: Skip the stress - immediately play your favorite levels anytime without going back through the whole game. Because who has time for that?

🎷 A soundtrack worth crowing about: Featuring 10 original tracks by the legendary Bjorn Lynne. Your ears will thank you.

🏆 Achievements and leaderboards: Think you’re the best? Prove it. Compete for high scores or just bask in the glory of your achievements (you earned them).

👀 Gorgeous retro-inspired graphics: Stunning high-res visuals that look amazing, even when Farmer Fred dies of embarrassment in full HD.

🧠 Fun for all ages: Challenging enough for adults but still kid-friendly - unless you consider alien robot chickens terrifying (we don’t judge).

Get ready for the most feather-ruffling, puzzle-solving, chicken-rescuing experience you’ve ever had. Chickens Be Crazy - the greatest game most people will likely never play. Will you?
